hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; fi
